calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-08-2011 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2011 Set For Trial On Dec-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Monica F. Wiley, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722.

Kurtiss Jacobs, Esq. appeared for plaintiff FIA Card Services.
Larry E. Fisher, Esq. appeared for defendant Larry E. Fisher, who was not present at today's hearing.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 10, 2010.

Settlement Agreement reached by the parties was placed on the record by Mr. Jacobs. In accordance with the terms of the agreement, a stipulated judgment shall issue against defendant Larry E. Fisher as follows:

Damages/Principal - $9,668.29.
Costs - $250.00.
Total - $9,918.29

Execution of the Judgment will be stayed until October 1, 2010.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Set For Trial On Jun-28-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
